reference: Hello! Pneumonia, bronchitis, and asthma are three completely different conditions. However, the child usually has a cough in all three situations. It is important to differentiate the cause of the cough. Treatment will be according to that. Talk to your doctor about it.
text: Hello! Pneumonia, bronchitis, and asthma are three completely different conditions. However, the child usually has a cough in all three situations. It is important to differentiate the cause of the cough. Treatment will be according to that. Talk to your doctor about it.
